name: Ben Carson
subject: Last night's ugly debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33541368:sPIBtLCPN:m:1:876315805:5C3C8A7A7DB7171F54A408E0363DF97F:r)
---

Peter,

Last night's debate was ugly, vicious, and not worthy of the American people.

There's a reason that the first word in my campaign slogan is "heal," and last night it was there for everyone to see. The cancer of divisiveness is corroding our politics and the soul of our nation and if we don't fix it, nothing else matters.

It's very easy to get pulled down into the mud. The media and our political class thrive on it. But I got into this race for bigger reasons, and I will continue to stay focused on the big picture.

Looking under the hood of what runs Washington, D.C. would cause any rational person to run in the other direction. For a time, I put myself in that category.

But this is about the future for our children and grandchildren. This is about the American people and the survival of our Republic -- and we simply cannot afford to lose this election.

If I have the honor of serving as your President, I will be accountable to all and beholden to none. My only goal will be to champion the average American whose voice has been ignored, and fight to defend our liberties, our values and our unique way of life.

Peter, we don't have to accept the way things are. We have the power to create real and lasting change, and I want to be the vessel through which you and all of your fellow Americans can create that positive change.

But we will only be successful if you are willing to continue to invest in this campaign. We've gone from 17 candidates down to 6 and our fight will only get more difficult.

[**I ask you to stand with me right now by making an urgent donation of just $3 or more.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33541368:sPIBtLCPN:m:1:876315805:5C3C8A7A7DB7171F54A408E0363DF97F:r)

Last night's debate was an ugly reminder of the nastiness and divisiveness of our politics. The South Carolina primary is now just 6 days away and we have an opportunity to reset the table.

We have a real chance to show the media and the political class that values and decency still matter, that solutions and substance still matter, and that "We the People" will never allow our country to be ripped apart.

[**Please, stand with me right now and make an urgent donation of just $3 or more.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33541368:sPIBtLCPN:m:1:876315805:5C3C8A7A7DB7171F54A408E0363DF97F:r)

Thank you for your faith in me, and your incredible dedication to this campaign.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson
**

**
| | | **
** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33541368:sPIBtLCPN:m:1:876315805:5C3C8A7A7DB7171F54A408E0363DF97F:r)** ** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33541369:sPIBtLCPN:m:1:876315805:5C3C8A7A7DB7171F54A408E0363DF97F:r)** **
---
| ****
---
| | **

** [****](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33541370:sPIBtLCPN:m:1:876315805:5C3C8A7A7DB7171F54A408E0363DF97F:r)
---

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313**

name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: It happened...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
After what happened on the debate stage last night, I cannot begin to tell you how serious this election is. People are getting sick of the circus. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542510:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

After what happened on the debate stage last night, I cannot begin to tell you how serious this election is.

**People are getting sick of the circus.**

Let me explain: you and I knew the debate was going to be a fight.

Unless our next president puts the needs of Americans first -- ahead of the wants of the Washington Cartel -- we are going to lose our country.

**Donald Trump relied on his magic pixie dust of faux conservatism in hopes that the voters of South Carolina will ignore his long record of liberal values.** He continues to believe that personal insults are more important to voters than positive solutions.

And once again, **Marco Rubio solidified himself as a "campaign conservative"** trying to have it both ways on amnesty -- when the record is clear he led the 'Gang of Eight' right alongside New York Democrat Chuck Schumer.

The future of our nation MUST be shaped by a consistent conservative who has proven that he keeps his promises when he goes to D.C.

So before I go any further -- I need to ask you a serious favor: [**will you stand by my side before South Carolina votes in just a few days?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542510:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

Friend, after the debate last night, how you and I respond could prove to be the most important moment of my campaign.

Needless to say, I need you by my side.

[**Will you make a ONE TIME supporting donation?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542510:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

I'm counting on you to make a special ONE TIME donation right now because throughout this campaign you have been there for me and so I ask you to stand with us once again. **Below I've asked my staff to place special donate buttons so you can contribute securely:**

[** SPECIAL - ONE TIME DONATE $10 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542511:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

[** SPECIAL - ONE TIME DONATE $25 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542512:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

[** SPECIAL - ONE TIME DONATE $50 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542513:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

[** SPECIAL - ONE TIME DONATE $150 » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542514:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

[** ANOTHER AMOUNT » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542515:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)
You and I have already faced brutal attacks since the day I announced my campaign, some from Hillary and some from my opponents, but every time we have gotten stronger.

Now the liberal media and some of my opponents are truly desperate to discredit and destroy me by any means necessary.

[**Will you make a special ONE TIME donation?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542510:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

I know it's a lot to ask, but you are one of my best supporters.

**So, that's why I'm turning to you first.** I need a ONE TIME donation _from you and every supporter of my campaign._

I have nowhere else to turn. [**Even the smallest amount can make all the difference.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33542510:suDn_LCNe:m:1:1104269936:27DDE2AC9F32FF85B826A208D3EBE08A:r)

Heidi and I are so very grateful for your continued support.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

|

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

subject: 🔥🔥Last night’s debate🔥🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212651:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)
---
| | | | Peter: Did you watch the debate last night? Marco was on fire. **Every answer he gave was strong and he showed South Carolina the Marco Rubio we know and America needs: a tough, well-prepared leader who will fight for his positive conservative vision.** **[Peter, Marco needs our immediate support to keep this momentum up until the South Carolina primary this coming Saturday.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212651:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)** There isn't a moment to lose. **[Your online donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212651:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)** will instantly provide resources for our volunteers and offices in South Carolina and ensure we can afford the get-out-the-vote efforts needed.
Please click one of the links below to make an instant donation:
---
| **[$ 10 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212652:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 15 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212653:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 25 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212654:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 50 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212655:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 75 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212656:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 100 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212657:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 150 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212658:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 250 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212659:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)****[$ 500 KEEP UP THE MARCOMENTUM IN SOUTH CAROLINA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212660:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r)**

| Peter, our time is now. [**_Please chip in whatever you can afford_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46212651:JvPQ17rNV:m:1:1349778030:C23C6C6D08B9F1FAB90AE1F5C2B40313:r) \-- **no matter the amount, it will help us save our country from falling into Hillary Clinton's hands.** **As Marco said last night, America needs a president like Ronald Reagan to pull us back from being a nation in decline. Alex Conant

name: Jeb Bush
subject: I can't do this alone
body:
Friend -- Stepping off that stage last night, I felt great. Waking up this morning and seeing how many supporters stepped up, I felt even better.

We won last night, I don't need the pundits to say it. I can see it from how many people are joining our team. It couldn't come at a better time. That was the debate performance we needed heading into the South Carolina primary.

Now we go directly to the people of South Carolina for the next 6 days. But we need you to join those who already stepped up. **We need to raise $100,000 in the next 48 hours, and we won't do that unless you chip in now.**

[**Friend, can I count on you to step up and contribute just $1 right away?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/twwfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtbmwww_mdbnnspw.html)

Look at what we've already done, first New Hampshire, and now this debate. It's clear the momentum is on our side, but we can't stop now or we'll lose it.

I email you a lot, but this is the email I need your response to the most, Friend.

**With only 6 days until the crucial South Carolina primary, if we don 't raise $100,000 in the next 48 hours, we won't have the resources we need on Saturday.**

That's why your help is critical right now.

We can't do this without you, Friend. **I need you to contribute just $1 right now to help us hit this goal:[Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pvvtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkgycffh_mdbnnspw.html)**

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qdhqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcvpnnw_mdbnnspw.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Melissa Gallahan, Hillary for Virginia
subject: Your chance to help Hillary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
| Friend --

Will you help get everyone ready to vote for Hillary in the primary on March 1st? We're having phone banks in Arlington, Reston, and Fairfax this week to reach as many Virginia voters as possible.

**Sign up for one of the phone banks below:**

| [ | [**Tuesday, February 16th in
Arlington (Courthouse Area)**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[ | [**Tuesday, February 16th in
Arlington (Rock Spring Area)**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[ | [**Thursday, February 18th in
Reston**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[ | [**Thursday, February 18th in
Fairfax**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[ | [**Thursday, February 18th in
South Arlington**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQ3MTg0OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzNjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Even if you can only join us for 30 minutes, you can make a big difference. RSVP, make some friends, and help us secure the nomination for Hillary.

Thank you,

Melissa

Melissa Gallahan
Virginia Statewide Organizing Lead
Hillary for America

---

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Will you help the families of Flint?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
What you can do to help Flint | _We usually send you emails about this campaign and how we can work together to help American families -- today, the families in Flint, Michigan need our help. Read the note below, and help out if you can._
Friend --

For two years, the people of Flint, Michigan, complained that their water was murky, that it smelled bad, that bathing in it gave them rashes -- and for two years, they were told they were wrong, and that their water was safe. But it wasn’t. It was poisoned, and the children of Flint were drinking it.

I traveled to Flint last weekend at the invitation of Mayor Karen Weaver to talk with residents and community leaders. The people I met were passionate, thoughtful, and tireless -- one 6-year-old came to our meeting, and his mom spoke about how she’d tried so hard to shield her son from the ills of the world, only to learn she’d been giving him baths in poisoned water.

What happened in Flint is the cruelest kind of indifference, and an affront to what we stand for as a nation. Clean water is not optional, and it’s not a luxury -- it’s a basic human right. The children of Flint are just as deserving of bright futures as the children of any other community. And today, those children need our help.

If you can, please chip in to support the Flint Child Health & Development Fund, which is working to provide health care and educational support to families in Flint affected by this crisis. We know that lead poisoning can affect kids for their whole lives, **so 100 percent of your donation will help provide ongoing services for the next 20 years to the most vulnerable families in Flint:**
[ | | [**Donate now**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3MTg0NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzMzI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ3MTg0NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzMzI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
We need to keep talking about Flint, and we need to make sure that every child in this country can grow up to reach his or her God-given potential -- no matter where they come from, the color of their skin, or how much money their parents make. Thank you for standing with me in this fight and so many others. Thank you for doing your part to help the children of Flint.

With deep appreciation,

Hillary

**[P.S. If you’re interested, take a moment to watch this video of my trip to Flint, then share it with friends and ask them to get involved, too:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ3MTg0NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzMzI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ3MTg0NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzMzI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
All donations will go to the Flint Child Health and Development Fund of the Community Foundation of Greater Flint.
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ3MTg0NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMjYzMzI1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America,
body:
Memo: Update from the Trail
From: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager

Gov. John Kasich finished a very strong second place in
the New Hampshire primary on Feb. 9th and his support is surging
leading up to the South Carolina primary on Feb. 20th and the
Nevada Caucus on Feb. 23rd. We have momentum but it's critical
that we keep building on our progress! Here are some short
updates and ways that you can get involved:

VICTORY in New Hampshire:

With our strong finish in New Hampshire, we proved that a
positive campaign focused on bringing people together and solving
problems works. Our fundraising is up, the crowds at our events
are swelling and we've seen rapidly growing interest in learning
more about Gov. John Kasich's message. Watch Gov. Kasich's
election night remarks:

South Carolina is Next:

South Carolinians will go to the polls on February 20th
and have their opportunity to weigh in on who should be our GOP
nominee for President. Nevadans will caucus three days later.

A new poll was released Saturday evening that showed Gov.
Kasich surging to second place! It's critical that we keep
pushing forward to grow our support in time for Election Day!

Following our strong New Hampshire finish, the crowd
sizes at our events in South Carolina have swelled. We had 900
people come out to see Gov. Kasich in Bluffton on Friday and 600
in Greenville earlier today. Thanks to your ongoing support, our
momentum is growing every day!

Saturday's CBS GOP Debate:

Gov. Kasich had another commanding performance in last
evening's GOP debate in Greenville, SC. He was widely credited
with having a strong message of unity and civility; he was the
adult on stage. Watch his closing remarks and read some
supportive comments below:

Frank Luntz: The NBA Slam Dunk Contest is tonight, and
@JohnKasich had the slam-dunk line of the #GOPDebate: "These
attacks will elect Hillary Clinton."

Mashable: While Trump tries to destroy Bush and Rubio and
Cruz are slapfighting, John Kasich stands out as a voice of
reason. http://on.mash.to/1TiSJbD

Dana Perino: The folks are gonna like Kasich. I've said
it before, and I stand by that

Hugh Hewitt: Huge opening to @johnkasich to go Reagan
again, +he takes it. "We are going to lose the election to
@hillaryclinton if we don't stop this."

Jasen Sokol: Kasich is absofreakinglutely right. These
candidates need to stop trampling Reagan's 11th Commandment.
#GOPDebate

Larry Sabato: John Kasich's positive approach is
looking better and better. Win or lose, he can at least hold his
head high.

New TV Ads:

We're up with two new TV ads in South Carolina. Watch
them below and chip in to help keep them running!

Ballot/Staff News:

• ENDORSED: The Dallas Morning News (read more)

• ENDORSED: Tajh Boyd - Former Clemson Quarterback
(read more)

• ENDORSED: South Carolina State Rep. Donna Hicks
Supports John Kasich for President (read more)

Upcoming Travel:

Gov. John Kasich will travel to the critical primary
state Michigan tomorrow to participate in Town Hall events in
Allendale, East Lansing (MSU), Utica and Livonia. He will then
return to South Carolina for several days of events to rally
support for the Feb 20th primary!

Paid for by Kasich For America,
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iso8TsrCNq

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oso8TsrCNq

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-32549405356-echo3-0918E7910CAD1C40C71AF713B4B9A00D@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: We can’t do this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
We have a lot of work to do | Friend --

I was so grateful to hear how many of you have stepped up to help launch our Super Tuesday Fund -- with just 16 days left until the big day, we have a lot of work to do! We’re competing in a dozen contests that day with more than 800 delegates at stake -- there's a lot on the line.

Senator Sanders’ campaign continues to outraise us, but this fund is a great opportunity to show just how strong our team really is. **If you’re with me, chip in $1 now -- it’s about more than money. It’s your way of saying you’re ready to win Super Tuesday, secure the nomination, and make history together:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3MjA2NjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMzMyOTE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3MjA2NjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMzMyOTE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

**Hillary needs you now more than ever. Chip in $1 to stand with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3MjA2NjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMzMyOTE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ3MjA2NjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQyMzMyOTE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Official BernieSanders.com
subject: The DNC's big mistake
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Eight years ago, then-Senator Barack Obama took the noble step of banning contributions to the Democratic National Committee from lobbyists.
He said, _"They will not fund my party. They will not run our White House. And they will not drown out the voice of the American people when I 'm president of the United States of America."_
This week, the DNC reversed that ban and will again get large contributions from these interests. Bernie thinks that's an unfortunate step backward. Sign our petition if you agree:
[**Tell the Democratic National Committee you support the restrictions put in place by President Obama that ban special interest contributions.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/DNC-ban?source=em160214full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/DNC-ban?source=em160214full")
**[Sign the Petition»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/DNC-ban?source=em160214full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/DNC-ban?source=em160214full")**
One of the many messages our campaign has effectively sent to the political establishment of this country is that the American people have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying elections.
Poll after poll tells us that citizens no longer have confidence in our political institutions. If we are to restore a vibrant democracy in this country, it is long past time to break the link between money and special interest favors in politics, and you can believe that's just what Bernie Sanders will do as president.
In 2008 and 2012, Democrats won with President Obama's ban on lobbyist money in place. We can do the same in 2016, and the DNC should continue to follow the president's leadership and keep the ban in place.
**Sign our petition if you agree:**
[**Tell the Democratic National Committee you support the restrictions put in place by President Obama that ban lobbyist contributions.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/DNC-ban?source=em160214full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/DNC-ban?source=em160214full")
Our campaign does not rely on the support of the nation's financial elite. Our campaign is funded by almost 4 million individual contributions averaging less than $30 a piece.
It's one of the reasons we are doing so well to this point.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em160214dnc-ban "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em160214dnc-ban")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Sisters and Brothers - Eight years ago, then-Senator Barack Obama took the noble step of banning contributions to the Democratic National Committee from lobbyists. He said, "They will not fund my party. They will not run our White House. And they will not drown out the voice of the American people when I 'm president of the United States of America." This week, the DNC reversed that ban and will again get large contributions from these interests. Bernie thinks that's an unfortunate step backward. Sign our petition if you agree: "" "" One of the many messages our campaign has effectively sent to the political establishment of this country is that the American people have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying elections. Poll after poll tells us that citizens no longer have confidence in our political institutions. If we are to restore a vibrant democracy in this country, it is long past time to break the link between money and special interest favors in politics, and you can believe that's just what Bernie Sanders will do as president. In 2008 and 2012, Democrats won with President Obama's ban on lobbyist money in place. We can do the same in 2016, and the DNC should continue to follow the president's leadership and keep the ban in place. Sign our petition if you agree: "" Our campaign does not rely on the support of the nation's financial elite. Our campaign is funded by almost 4 million individual contributions averaging less than $30 a piece. It's one of the reasons we are doing so well to this point. In solidarity, Jeff Weaver Campaign Manager Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
